name: BBQ Tuna Burgers
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz chunk lite tuna can, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the tuna with a fork.
2. Mix in the bread crumbs, egg, celery, salad dressing, and onion.
3. Form into 4 patties.
4. Barbecue or fry for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until cooked through.
5. Place patties on lettuce-lined buns.
6. Garnish with sliced tomatoes and additional salad dressing.
